---
title: "check_openssl_installed"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `check_openssl_installed()`

Check for OpenSSL System Dependency

## Usage

```r
check_openssl_installed()
```

## Value

Returns 'TRUE' invisibly if found; otherwise, throws an error.

## Description

Verifies that the 'openssl' command-line tool is installed and accessible
via the system's PATH. Required for RSA-PSS signing.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
check_openssl_installed()

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other authentication: 
`generate_kalshi_keypair()`,
`get_kalshi_access_token()`
